title: DISTINCT malfunctions for VIEW with virtual table
poc:
with a COUNT:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v0 WHERE v0.c0;
key_bug_features: DISTINCT malfunction in VIEW with virtual table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 REAL);
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt1 USING fts5(c1, c2);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT DISTINCT t1.c1 FROM vt1 JOIN t1 ON vt1.c1 = t1.c1 ORDER BY vt1.rowid;
